mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('users_seq')
INSERT INTO users (USER_ID, DISPLAY_NAME, EMAIL_ID, MOBILE_NUMBER) VALUES (#{userId},#{displayName}, #{emailId}, #{mobileNumber})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET display_name = #{displayName}, email_id = #{emailId}, mobile_number = #{mobileNumber} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, display_name AS displayName, email_id AS emailId, mobile_number AS mobileNumber FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id AS userId, display_name AS displayName, email_id AS emailId, mobile_number AS mobileNumber FROM users WHERE mobile_number = #{mobileNumber}
